title: SharedDefinitions
description: Shared type definitions used across multiple artifact schemas. Note: $id URLs are identifiers, not resolvable endpoints.

SourceRef.description: Reference to a source document that provides basis for artifact content.

id.description: Identifier of the source item, e.g., 'AC-1', 'BR-2', 'BUG-123'.

kind.description: Kind of source: spec (specification), ac (acceptance criteria), rule (business rule), bug (defect), auto_test (automated test), code_review (review comment), ops (operational data), confluence (Confluence page), jira (Jira issue).

excerpt.description: Optional excerpt of the source content for reference.

url.description: Optional URL to the source document.

Assumption.description: Assumption made when information is incomplete. Must be tracked for risk assessment.

severity.description: Severity level: low (minor impact), medium (some impact), high (significant impact), critical (blocking if wrong).

impact_on_coverage.description: How this assumption affects test coverage or approach.

Oracle.description: Oracle definition: how expected results are determined.

type.description: Oracle type: specified (in spec/AC), derived (from rules/old system), implicit (standard expectations), human (judgment needed).

refs.description: References to source for oracle, e.g., ['AC-1', 'BR-2'].

notes.description: Additional notes on oracle derivation or limitations.

ConfidenceLevel.description: Confidence in correctness: high (well-established), medium (reasonable basis), low (uncertain).

Priority.description: Risk-based priority: P0 (critical), P1 (high), P2 (medium), P3 (low).

TestView.description: Testing view: black (external UI), gray (limited internal), white (full internal).

GateStatus.description: Gate decision: go (release ready), conditional_go (with conditions), no_go (blocked).
